To: R. Adekanmi
From: PC
Subject: How we win this — read + plan

R — good news is I read the room and I think we can still win this if we move fast.

Here's the play. Lena is clearly carrying water for the sponsor on the fast-follow — that 1:1 two days before plus her "socialise it with the exec group" question is her teeing up the kill. So we get ahead of her: you go to the sponsor tomorrow, before Lena can lock him in, and reframe it as your idea so she doesn't own the narrative.

On Tom and Priya — they're aligned, so split them. Tom's the driver; Priya just follows. I can have a quiet word with Priya, mention that a fast-follow would push her Clinical Systems milestone into the same window as her audit, and let her draw her own conclusions. That peels her off Tom without you having to touch it.

I'd also gently remind the sponsor, in passing, that the last descope Lena pushed didn't land well — just to put a little doubt on her judgment before the decision. Nothing you can be pinned to.

If we line all that up this week, we flip at least one BU lead and dent Lena's framing, and Federation stays in Q4. Want me to start with Priya?

PC
